name: Next Day Turkey & Bacon Cheeseburgers
recipeIngredient: 8 Slices OSCAR MAYER Center Cut Bacon, crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
Substitute 1/4 cup OSCAR MAYER Real Bacon Pieces for Bacon.
MIX turkey, bacon, crumbs, eggs, Worcestershire sauce and pepper in medium bowl. Shape into 4 patties.
HEAT lightly oiled skillet on medium heat for 1 minute. Add patties to skillet; cover. Cook 3 to 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown. TOP each patty with process cheese slice during last minute of cooking time. TOP each patty with 1 pickle; serve on hamburger bun with condiments.
